ai_summary: This document is a routine compliance filing by Arihant Capital Markets Limited under SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. Their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent confirmed that all dematerialization requests were properly processed, confirmed to depositories, and physical certificates mutilated/cancelled within the stipulated 15-day timeframe. There are no material financial impacts or red flags identified; it signifies proper adherence to operational regulatory requirements.
